title: Zipminator-PQC: Post-Quantum Cryptography Platform with Quantum Entropy
description: NIST FIPS 203 ML-KEM-768 implementation with quantum entropy harvesting from IBM Quantum hardware, Rigetti, and qBraid. Includes Python SDK, Rust cryptographic core, PII scanning for 15 jurisdictions, and 10-level data anonymization. Implements methods described in IACR ePrint 2026/108710, 108711, 108712 and covered by three filed patents at Patentstyret (Norwegian Patent Office).
